UI_Reason_TranslationDeadEnd: Missing File Data: The Deep Scan searched all active mods, but this translation key does not exist in any XML file.
UI_Reason_RunScanForTranslation: Missing UI Translation: A mod is missing a translation key. Archotech Logs needs to re-index all mod files to find which mod owns this specific XML tag.
UI_Reason_RunScanForCrossRef: Missing Cross-Reference: A mod is looking for an item that doesn't exist. Click 'Deep Scan' to hunt down which active mod's XML patch is asking for it.
UI_Reason_TranslationSummaryFallback: Global Summary: The engine found multiple translation errors. See the 'Details' section below for the full list.
UI_AutoOpenDirTip: Automatically opens the Windows File Explorer window whenever an export task completes.
UI_AggressiveFilteringTip: Prevents duplicate log entries from flooding the diagnostics report.
UI_ShowGlobalButtonTip: Adds a small Archotech icon to the bottom-right for quick access.
UI_AlwaysShowDeepScan: Always Show Deep Scan on Main Menu
UI_AlwaysShowDeepScanTip: Forces the 'Deep Scan' button to remain on the main menu.
UI_DefaultOnlineTip: Sets whether the Export Hub starts with 'Online Export' selected.
UI_OpenViewerFolderMsg: This will take you out of the game to your local file explorer.
UI_ExportHubDesc: Primary viewer offers deep diagnostics, while raw log is a fallback. Exporting opens results on your desktop.
UI_RawGameLogTip: A complete dump of the standard game console messages.
UI_EnhancedGameLogTip: Reformatted log with Harmony markers and suspect tracking.
UI_AIDiagnosticsTip: Structured JSON optimized for LLM troubleshooting.
UI_ModListTip: Full list of active mods, versions, and package IDs.
UI_DSTraceReportTip: Captures unidentified log entities for deep-scan analysis.
UI_UnityEngineLogTip: The full Unity console log. Essential for debugging engine crashes.
UI_OnlineDisabledTip: (Disabled for Online Export to protect personal technical information)
UI_LocalTip: Generates a fully private offline database in your mod folder.
UI_OnlineTip: Uploads an anonymized report to the Archotech Cloud Proxy.
UI_SelectDataArchiveTip: Select at least one data archive above.
UI_BuildAndOpenViewerTip: Builds and opens the comprehensive Archotech LogViewer with all selected details.
UI_TrackingAccuracyTip: Shows how certain the biological engine is about the suspected mod origin.
UI_OriginUnidentified: <color=#ff595e>Origin Unidentified</color> - No modded fingerprints found in stack trace.
UI_AIBriefingMsg:
{0}

A diagnostic briefing has been copied to your clipboard. Paste it into your AI assistant for a deep trace. Note: This action will take you out of the game to your web browser.
UI_OpenGoogleSearch: Opening Google to search for this error string.
UI_MissingXML: Missing XML link. A mod requirement is likely missing.
UI_IssueExpl_ArchotechFeedback: The diagnostic tool is running a self-check. This is a normal part of its operation.
UI_IssueExpl_VanillaStartup: The game is starting up and loading its main files. This is normal.
UI_IssueExpl_Crossref: A mod is looking for a specific item or rule that it cannot find.
UI_IssueExpl_MVCF: A special combat tool used by many mods is setting up. This is normal.
UI_IssueExpl_MVCFAnalysis: The Combat Framework (MVCF) is analyzing pawn definitions.
UI_IssueExpl_VanillaExpanded: The Vanilla Expanded Framework is setting up its various features.
UI_IssueExpl_JobDriverException: A person or animal tried to do something but got stuck.
UI_IssueExpl_TerrainPatch: A mod is trying to change the appearance or behavior of the ground.
UI_IssueExpl_ConfigError: A mod has a typo in its instructions.
UI_IssueExpl_OnGUIException: A menu or button failed to appear.
UI_IssueExpl_TypeNotFound: The game is looking for a mod feature that seems to be missing.
UI_IssueExpl_DuplicateDef: Two mods are trying to add the exact same thing to the game.
UI_IssueExpl_MouseStack: A UI window finished drawing but forgot to clean up.
UI_IssueExpl_NullMapPawn: A pawn tried to do something while not actually being on a map.
UI_IssueExpl_NullRef: A common error where the game tries to use something that doesn't exist.
UI_IssueExpl_WindowFillException: A specific interface window crashed while trying to display.
UI_IssueExpl_IndexOutOfRange: A mod's code tried to access a list item that doesn't exist.
UI_IssueExpl_MissingMethod: A mod is calling a function that it cannot find.
UI_IssueExpl_StackOverflow: A logic loop has occurred, which may impact system stability.
UI_IssueExpl_FailedToLoadAsset: The game couldn't find a texture or sound file.
UI_IssueExpl_DivideByZero: A mod tried to perform a math calculation dividing by zero.
UI_IssueExpl_KeyNotFound: A mod tried to look up data in a dictionary but the key was missing.
UI_IssueExpl_OutOfMemory: The game has run out of system RAM.
UI_IssueExpl_FieldAccess: A mod tried to access a private variable in another mod.
UI_IssueExpl_UninitializedDefOf: A mod tried to use a game reference before it finished loading.
UI_IssueExpl_InvalidPackageId: A mod's internal identifier is invalid.
UI_IssueExpl_MissingDownloadUrl: A mod has a dependency listed but no download link.
UI_IssueExpl_MissingDependency: A mod is missing a required component.
UI_IssueExpl_PawnKindError: The game failed to generate a specific pawn.
UI_IssueExpl_TranslationMissing: A mod is missing text for your language.
UI_IssueExpl_GraphicError: An item failed to draw its visual sprite.
UI_IssueExpl_MapGenError: Critical error during world or map generation.
UI_IssueExpl_IncidentError: A game event crashed while trying to start.
UI_IssueExpl_ScenarioError: The starting scenario contains an invalid part.
UI_IssueExpl_ThoughtError: A pawn's mood or thought crashed.
UI_IssueExpl_AccessViolation: The code tried to access protected memory.
UI_IssueExpl_Harmony: A mod is using Harmony to modify biological code.
UI_IssueExpl_Applied: A mod has successfully injected its code changes.
UI_IssueExpl_Initialized: A mod's controller has finished startup.
UI_IssueExpl_Default: Analyzing data string. No detailed explanation yet.
UI_Legend_OrangeDesc: Multiple mods fighting over engine hooks.
UI_SearchOnlineHelp: SEARCH ONLINE: Google search for the error.
UI_DeepScanHelp: DEEP SCAN: Re-indexes mod files for tracking.
UI_Reason_EmptyTrace: No mod info found in error.
UI_Reason_GenericFailure: Could not find exact mod cause.
UI_Reason_ExplicitDef: Direct Match: Mentions a modded item.
UI_Reason_DeepScanTrace: File Match: Mod file found in error.
UI_Reason_ExplicitPrefix: Direct Label: Mod attached its name.
UI_Reason_ExplicitLogTrace: Enhanced Trace: Tagged by log tool.
UI_Viewer_UnityLogWarning: The Unity Engine Log (Player.log) may contain sensitive paths.
UI_Viewer_LookForDesc: Focus on Red and Deep Red entries in the Enhanced Log.
UI_Viewer_NoModsFound: No mods found in the archive.
UI_Viewer_DescSessionLog: Raw Game Log: Technical sequence of events.
UI_Viewer_DescAIDiagnostics: AI Diagnostics: Structured for AI tools.
UI_Viewer_DescTraceReport: DS Trace Report: Unidentified log entities.
UI_Viewer_DescModList: Archotech Mod List: Active mods and versions.
UI_IssueExpl_NamespaceAI: A person or creature is performing a task.
UI_IssueExpl_NamespaceScribe: The game is saving or loading progress.
UI_IssueExpl_HarmonyTranspiler: A Transpiler has modified engine function.
UI_IssueExpl_GhostData: Broken data from removed mod in save.
UI_PurgeAppDataMsg: Incinerate every piece of data this mod has generated?
UI_PurgeAllAppDataTip: Terminal cleanup of the 'ArchotechLogs' AppData folder.
UI_IssueExpl_TranslationSummary: There are translation errors or missing text for your current language. This may prevent some game text from being displayed correctly.
